case_title: NAJIBULLAH NAIMI VS. JANICE B TUBIG

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-10-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-10-2018 BY CECILIA P. CASTELLANOS. PLAINTIFF NAJIBULLAH NAIMI IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT JANICE TUBIG IS PRESENT. NO PROOF OF SERVICE. DEFENDANT JANICE TUBIG WAIVES HER RIGHT TO SERVICE. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CECILIA P. CASTELLANOS; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-10-2018 - JUDGMENT.

AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 (SC-100 STAMPED: "FILED BY FAX") FILED BY NAIMI, NAJIBULLAH AS TO DEFENDANT TUBIG, JANICE B ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-10-2018 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF NAIMI, NAJIBULLAH RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TUBIG, JANICE B $10,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $10,075.00, FOR MEDICAL EXPENSES IN CONNECTION WITH AUTO COLLISION AND FOR PAIN AND SUFFERING DAMAGES. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JUL-02-2018 ORDERED DESTROYED
